channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 063e4498-230d-40a9-be9b-037f35f982b5
Display name: Azure Notebooks NotebookProxy Contributor
Description: Can create, read, update, delete NotebookProxy resources and manage their credentials under Microsoft.Notebooks.
Link: https://management.azure.com/063e4498-230d-40a9-be9b-037f35f982b5?api-version=2022-04-01
